subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath revealed unto them that have believed in the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, Who hath raised up the heaven of utterance by His command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالمهیمن القیوم الذی رفع سماء البیان امرا من عنده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
